Rebecca Sterling, Esq.
Corporate Associate Attorney, New York, NY
rebecca.sterling@example.com | 555-201-3005 | linkedin.com/in/rebecca-sterling

SUMMARY
Corporate associate attorney with 5 years at an Am Law 100 firm, focused on
mergers & acquisitions and general corporate counsel. Experienced drafting and
negotiating commercial contracts, leading due diligence, and advising clients on
regulatory compliance.

EXPERIENCE
Associate Attorney, Corporate / M&A — Whitman & Crowe LLP (2020–present)
- Draft and negotiate purchase agreements, NDAs, and commercial contracts for
  M&A transactions and corporate clients across technology and healthcare.
- Lead legal due diligence workstreams; manage document review and coordinate
  with opposing counsel through closing.
- Advise clients on corporate governance, securities, and regulatory compliance
  matters; prepare board resolutions and legal memoranda.

Litigation Associate — Whitman & Crowe LLP (2019–2020)
- Supported commercial litigation matters, including discovery, legal research,
  and drafting motions and briefs.

SKILLS
Legal, litigation, contracts, contract negotiation, due diligence, corporate
law, mergers and acquisitions, regulatory compliance, legal research, drafting,
discovery, corporate governance, securities, counsel

ADMISSIONS & EDUCATION
Admitted to the New York State Bar
J.D., Columbia Law School, 2019
B.A. Political Science, Georgetown University, 2016
